action.edit.description: Edit this tile's content and properties

action.reroll.description: Randomize the background image on this tile
action.remove.description: Delete this tile — you can find it again in history
action.files.description: View and download files attached to this tile
action.contact.description: Add or edit the contact card on this tile
action.break-apart.description: Restore this hidden tile to full visibility
action.hide.description: Hide this tile from the visible grid
action.adopt.description: Add this tile to your own collection
action.sync.description: Adopt the publisher's latest visuals into this tile
action.features.description: See the bee features this tile uses — opens the features list on the right
action.block.description: Block this tile from appearing in your view

history.title: browser history
history.selection-merge: merge selected layers into new head
history.group-step: group step — undo/redo skips edits and jumps to the earliest tile add/remove
slash.keyword: Add or remove keywords (tags) on selected tiles
tags.viewer.title: Tags
tags.empty: No tags yet — add one with a cell:tag command or /keyword.
tags.filter.hint: filter the hive to tiles with this tag
tags.count.hint: tiles with this tag on this page
tags.foot.hint: Click a tag to filter · click a swatch to recolor
tags.scope-local: Filtering this page only — click to widen to children, then the whole hive
tags.scope-children: Filtering this page and its children — click to widen to the whole hive
tags.scope-global: Filtering the whole hive — click to narrow back to this page
slash.meeting: Start or join a video meeting on the selected tile
slash.remove: Remove tiles from the current directory
slash.format: Copy visual formatting from the active tile
slash.layout: Save, apply, list, or remove layout templates
slash.swirl: Arrange tiles into the index spiral
slash.move: Toggle move mode for drag-reordering tiles
slash.expand: Expand selected tiles into constituent parts via Claude Haiku
slash.theme: Switch the UI theme (light, dark, system)
slash.header: Set the header size (1 = small, 2 = medium, 3 = large)
slash.translate-sweep: Batch-translate all tiles (dry-run by default; add --go to execute)
slash.accent: Set the hover accent color by name
slash.border: Tile border style — neon glow on/off; neon | off
slash.sequence: Set the drop-target order new tiles fill
sequence.hint: Click hexes in order to set where new tiles land.
slash.record: Start AI-powered meeting recording with live hierarchy compilation
slash.domain: Add, remove, or list mesh relay domains
slash.substrate: Toggle default background images for new tiles
slash.backgrounds: View or toggle which default background images are available
slash.canvas: Choose the screen backdrop (hex dots, honeycomb, depth, …)
slash.dropbox: Make this location a typed file dropbox (cascades to its subtree)
slash.files: Browse files attached to the selected tiles, or every tile in view
slash.observe: Observe the swarm — who is here and what they share
features.viewer.title: Features
observe.title: Observe
observe.empty: No one else is here yet.
observe.group.hint: Group: all · by participant · by domain
features.adopt.hint: Take this tile's branch and its features — leads into the adopt process
features.empty: Click a tile's features icon to see the bees it uses.
features.none: No bee features on this tile.
features.want.hint: Stage this feature — it will be pre-ticked when you open the installer. Nothing turns on now.
features.local.hint: Shown for reference. This tile has no installable branch, so staging it won't pre-tick the installer.
features.staged.hint: Like the features you want — they come focused and pre-ticked when you next open the installer.
features.review.title: Review · {label}
features.review.note: This page comes from another participant. Review its code, then enable it — nothing runs until you accept.
features.review.bypass.hint: Enable without reviewing the code — you accept the risk.
features.hide.hint: Turn this feature off and keep it in the hidden pool — restore it any time. Nothing is deleted.
features.restore.hint: Bring this feature back — it turns on again at this location.
features.applied.empty: No features on this layer yet.
features.available.empty: This layer already has every feature.
features.like.hint: Like this feature — it'll be focused and pre-ticked when you open the installer. Nothing turns on now.
features.liked.hint.one: 1 feature liked — focused and pre-ticked next time you open the installer.
features.liked.hint.other: {count} features liked — focused and pre-ticked next time you open the installer.
features.cap.dropbox.desc: Accepts dropped files across this whole subtree.
features.allow.hint: Allow it anyway — activate this feature now without waiting for community verification. Its resources may load.
features.enable.hint: Add this feature to the tile — it turns on now.
features.bulk.allow.hint: Allow every selected unverified feature at once.
features.bulk.download.hint: Fetch the selected features' content and resources onto this machine.
features.bulk.hint.one: 1 row selected — allow or download it from the bar above.
features.bulk.hint.other: {count} rows selected — allow or download them from the bar above.
features.foot.hint: Toggle a feature to add it or turn it off. Click rows to select them for bulk allow / download.
features.unknown.desc: This feature comes from a module you don't have. It stays inert here — you can hide it, or allow it for when its module arrives.

webgl.howto: Hypercomb draws its tiles with WebGL, which this browser is blocking. Safari: turn off Lockdown Mode for this site (Settings → Privacy & Security). Chrome: turn on "Use graphics acceleration when available" (Settings → System) and relaunch. Then reload this page.

command-line.create-nested: Create nested folders, stay at current level with parent path retained
command-line.navigate-folder: Go to a folder, creating it if it doesn't exist

apply-update.title: New features ready
apply-update.changes: New tiles, tools, and fixes are ready to install.
dcp.upgrade-new.one: 1 new feature from this update — off until you turn it on
dcp.upgrade-new.other: {count} new features from this update — off until you turn them on

keymap.arrangePrev: Arrange tiles by the previous sequence
dcp.title: Diamond Core Processor
dcp.overwrite-hint: Reuse this name as-is instead of auto-incrementing if it is already taken
dcp.adopt-hint: Install and enable this package — live in your view now
dcp.save-hint: Keep installed but off — a saved revision you can enable later

dcp.focus-network: focus on network calls, data exfiltration, and token/resource access
dcp.relay-description: The relay handles mesh communication between peers. Install it locally or point to a remote relay.
dcp.relay-install-description: Download the installer, then double-click it to start the relay. Requires Node.js 20+.
dcp.trust-description: Add trusted auditor endpoints that vouch for code signatures. Content must meet the approval threshold before it is marked as trusted.
dcp.editor-empty: No bees or dependencies in this layer.

slash.clear-mesh: Wipe the relay event store and drop peer caches
